description: A customer wants to know how many loyalty points they have and what they can be redeemed for.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's loyalty program balance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the customer has 1,500 points.

nodes.task_description: Explain the redemption options (e.g., 500 points = $5 discount).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates how the points can be used.
